primary-font.value: Open Sans, Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, Sans-Serif

secondary-font.value: Open Sans, Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, Sans-Serif

sportsbook-font.description:
This font family is used for font category defined as "Decoration".
Betsson Sans is used only for Betsson. The other brands will use Poppins

sportsbook-weight.description: Used in Sportsbook for minigames not related to traditional markets (aka Decoration typography)

fds-on-success-alternate.description: Used on system colours, not on system surface colours, for Badges

fds-on-alert-alternate.description: Used on system colours, not on system surface colours, for Badges

fds-on-info-alternate.description: Used on system colours, not on system surface colours, for Badges

fds-on-error-alternate.description: Used on system colours, not on system surface colours, for Badges

fds-sb-event-Info.description:
--fds-sb-product-event-info

**This used for streaming icon and theorically, Live icon.**

fds-sb-disabled.description: This token will be applied in the component opacity. It's not used to change the opacity of background or surfaces in the sportsbook.

fds-spacing-const-badge-lg-v.description: High-contrast 'pill' vertical padding for primary status chips; creates a lozenge feel.

fds-spacing-const-badge-lg-h.description: High-contrast 'pill' horizontal padding; ensures text doesn't crowd curved edges.

fds-spacing-const-badge-sm-v.description: Tightest possible vertical inset for inline textual indicators to prevent line-height disruption.

fds-spacing-const-badge-sm-h.description: Minimal horizontal padding for small badges to maintain a compact footprint.

fds-spacing-const-btn-lg-v.description: Optimized vertical padding for high-visibility primary CTAs; prioritizes touch/click hit-area.

fds-spacing-const-btn-lg-h.description: Generous horizontal runway for large buttons to create strong visual emphasis.

fds-spacing-const-btn-reg-v.description: The baseline 'workhorse' vertical density for standard application-wide interactions.

fds-spacing-const-btn-reg-h.description: Standard horizontal padding for regular buttons; provides balanced optical weight.

fds-spacing-const-btn-sm-v.description: Compressed vertical padding for secondary actions or buttons placed within toolbars.

fds-spacing-const-btn-sm-h.description: Reduced horizontal padding for smaller action components in dense UI areas.

fds-spacing-const-btn-tiny-v.description: Minimalist vertical padding for micro-UIs or buttons living within tight list items.

fds-spacing-const-btn-tiny-h.description: Tight horizontal padding for the smallest button tier to maintain functional proximity.

fds-spacing-const-input-v.description: Vertical padding for text entry fields; height-matched to btn-reg for layout alignment.

fds-spacing-const-input-h.description: Horizontal padding for inputs to provide buffer between text and border.

fds-spacing-const-container-canvas-reg.description: The global 'gutter' that prevents content from touching screen edges in standard views.

fds-spacing-const-container-canvas-lg.description: Wider safe-zone/inset for hero sections or expansive wide-screen layouts.

fds-spacing-const-container-card.description: The internal 'air' or padding required within a card or content container.

fds-spacing-const-gap-v-section.description: Macro-separation between massive, unrelated page blocks or sections.

fds-spacing-const-gap-v-group.description: Meso-separation between distinct clusters of components (e.g., fieldset to fieldset).

fds-spacing-const-gap-v-pattern.description: Atomic rhythmic spacing between identical units like sibling Input fields.

fds-spacing-const-gap-h-pattern.description: Horizontal rhythmic distance between sibling components to maintain a predictable grid.

fds-spacing-const-density-compact.description: Maximizes data visibility per viewport; minimizes whitespace for power-user views.

fds-spacing-const-density-reg.description: Balanced density for standard lists and menus; optimized for general accessibility.

fds-spacing-const-density-wide.description: Premium editorial spacing; used to focus attention on high-value individual content pieces.

fds-spacing-const-overlay-popover.description: Internal padding for floating UI elements like Tooltips, Dropdowns, and Menus.

fds-spacing-const-overlay-modal-gutter.description: Protective safe-margin between a modal's boundary and the viewport edge.

fds-spacing-const-ui-gap.description: A fixed 8px anchor distance between an icon and its text label across all components.

fds-spacing-const-ui-inset-reg.description: Square-ratio padding utility for icon-only buttons or avatars to ensure a 1:1 bounding box.

fds-gaming-thumbnail-hover.description: Should be radial and not linear

fds-z-index-const-drawer-scrim.description: Backdrop for drawers; blocks interaction with canvas content.

fds-z-index-const-drawer.description: Modal-class drawer; sits above canvas but below global navigation per design choice.

fds-z-index-const-docked.description: Global bottom or site navigation; remains interactive and visible above drawers.

fds-z-index-const-snackbar.description: Short-lived status messages; appears above navigation.

fds-z-index-const-popover.description: Contextual UI like tooltips and menus; must overlay navigation and drawers.

fds-z-index-const-modal.description: Full blocking dialogs; overlays all standard UI including navigation.

fds-z-index-const-priority.description: Absolute system-level priority; for critical alerts or overrides.

fds-motion-const-dust-std.description: Composite: Micro-state feedback. Immediate response (0ms delay) with a sharp linear-out stop for high-density UI responsiveness.

fds-motion-const-pebble-in.description: Composite: Small element arrival (Badges/Icons). 40ms staggered delay allows motion to be perceived before full opacity.

fds-motion-const-pebble-out.description: Composite: Small element dismissal. 0ms delay and accelerated exit for perceived performance.

fds-motion-const-brick-in.description: Composite: Standard component arrival (Tooltips/Menus). 80ms delay creates an organic, 'weighted' feel during expansion.

fds-motion-const-brick-out.description: Composite: Standard component collapse. Fast exit with no delay to ensure task completion feels instantaneous.

fds-motion-const-boulder-in.description: Composite: Large surface entry (Modals/Drawers). 120ms staggered delay provides a premium, atmospheric arrival effect.

fds-motion-const-boulder-out.description: Composite: Large surface dismissal. High acceleration off-canvas to clear the user's workspace immediately.

fds-motion-const-mountain-std.description: Composite: Page-level layout swaps. Long duration and significant delay (150ms) for high-fidelity brand storytelling.

fds-round-const-btn-sm.description: Tight radius for compact action hit-areas; maintains professional precision.

fds-round-const-btn-reg.description: Standard baseline radius for primary interactions; the core of the system.

fds-round-const-btn-lg.description: Softer radius for high-emphasis hero actions to create a friendly affordance.

fds-round-const-badge-sm.description: Professional, crisp rounding for inline status indicators.

fds-round-const-badge-lg.description: Softer rounding for prominent information chips to differentiate from buttons.

fds-round-const-input-reg.description: Height-matched to btn-reg for cohesive form rhythm and optical alignment.

fds-round-const-nav-item-sm.description: Efficient rounding for sidebar or dense menu links; optimizes space.

fds-round-const-nav-item-lg.description: Comfortable, touch-friendly rounding for primary tabs and navigation targets.

fds-round-const-nav-indicator.description: High-contrast capsule shape for active states to clearly signal selection.

fds-round-const-container-reg.description: Default radius for standard UI containers, Cards, Tables, and Groups.

fds-round-const-container-lg.description: Enhanced radius for wide containers to preserve geometric harmony when nested.

fds-round-const-modal-reg.description: Standard corner logic for Dialogs and Popups to maintain structural consistency.

fds-round-const-modal-lg.description: Max-radius for large surfaces like Drawers and Bottom Sheets to soften presence.

fds-round-const-nav-container-reg.description: Professional rounding for sidebar or header blocks; matches container baseline.

fds-round-const-nav-container-btm.description: Soft, ergonomic rounding for mobile bottom bars to feel integrated with hardware.

fds-round-const-media-thumb-sm.description: Softened corners for small profile or media assets to appear more organic.

fds-round-const-media-thumb-reg.description: Standard media radius for card-based imagery; balances softness and structure.

fds-round-const-media-thumb-lg.description: Maximum organic softness for large-scale media assets or hero imagery.

fds-round-const-ui-min.description: The system floor for rounding (4px); ensures a baseline 'soft' brand feel.

fds-round-const-ui-inner.description: Computed radius for elements nested inside a container to ensure concentric curves.

fds-round-const-ui-pill.description: Creates perfect pills, capsules, or circles regardless of element dimensions.

fds-round-const-ui-none.description: Forces absolute sharp corners for edge-to-edge UI or segmented controls.

fds-utility-const-invert.description: filter: invert() toggle — 0 keeps assets un-inverted (default surface); 1 flips to white (alternate surface).

fds-elevation-const-surface-heavy.description: High-density elevation for elements sitting low on the canvas; tight, single-layer anchor shadow.

fds-elevation-const-surface-medium.description: 2-layer balanced depth for standard cards and sections; utilizes a penumbra/umbra stack for natural diffusion.

fds-elevation-const-surface-light.description: Low-density, high-float elevation for modals and popovers; uses negative spread to prevent muddy edges.

fds-elevation-const-alternate-surface-he.description: Optical correction for dark surfaces; increased alpha to maintain visibility of dense objects.

fds-elevation-const-alternate-surface-me.description: Deep 2-layer shadow for high separation on alternate/dark surfaces.

fds-elevation-const-alternate-surface-li.description: Maximum separation for overlays on dark backgrounds; ensures UI hierarchy remains perceptible.

fds-specular-const-gloss-on-surface.description: Subtle 40% white specular catch for light surfaces; adds tactile bevel without over-exposure.

fds-specular-const-gloss-on-alternate-su.description: High-contrast 100% white specular glint for dark surfaces; mimics physical light reflection.

fds-specular-const-gloss-on-surface-colo.description: Vibrant 80% white specular for brand-colored surfaces; enhances chroma and depth.

fds-specular-const-matte-on-system.description: Low-profile internal bevel for system elements; provides structural depth without high-gloss.

fds-specular-const-emission-primary.description: Faint ambient outer glow using the primary brand colour — reinforces brand identity on elevated or featured elements.

fds-specular-const-emission-secondary.description: Faint ambient outer glow using the secondary brand colour — used for accent or complementary brand moments.

fds-specular-const-emission-success.description: Faint ambient outer glow for success system state — reinforces positive feedback on indicators or badges.

fds-specular-const-emission-alert.description: Faint ambient outer glow for alert system state — draws attention to warning-level elements.

fds-specular-const-emission-error.description: Faint ambient outer glow for error system state — signals critical validation or failure states.

fds-specular-const-emission-info.description: Faint ambient outer glow for info system state — subtly highlights informational elements.

fds-stroke-const-ui-s-on-surface.description: Subtle hairline border for light containment on primary surfaces; minimizes visual noise.

fds-stroke-const-ui-reg-on-surface.description: Standard baseline border for cards and sections on primary surfaces.

fds-stroke-const-ui-s-on-alternate-surfa.description: Subtle border with optical correction (increased width) for visibility on alternate/lower-contrast surfaces.

fds-stroke-const-ui-reg-on-alternate-sur.description: Standard baseline border for containers sitting on alternate-surface backgrounds.

fds-stroke-const-int-rest.description: Neutral state boundary for interactive elements (Inputs, Selects, Cards) in their inactive/rest state.

fds-stroke-const-int-active.description: Focus/Active state; utilizes increased width and brand primary color for clear accessibility feedback.

fds-stroke-const-int-error.description: Critical validation state; signals error or required attention via width and system error color.

fds-stroke-const-int-success.description: Positive validation state; signals successful completion or valid input.

fds-stroke-const-int-disabled.description: Inert state boundary; uses ultra-low contrast to signal non-interactive status.

fds-stroke-const-ghost-on-surface.description: Primary brand outline for secondary actions/ghost buttons on standard surfaces.

fds-stroke-const-ghost-on-alternate-surf.description: High-contrast outline for ghost actions on dark or alternate-surface backgrounds.

fds-stroke-const-ghost-on-surface-color.description: Inverted/Contrast-safe outline for actions sitting on primary colored surfaces.

fds-stroke-const-divider-reg.description: Subtle hairline separator for internal lists or repeating rhythmic content units.

fds-stroke-const-divider-heavy.description: Stronger separator used to define distinct logical content groups or major sections.

fds-stroke-const-ui-transparent.description: Transparent placeholder border to prevent layout 'jumping' during hover/state transitions.

fds-stroke-const-ui-focus-ring.description: Dedicated accessibility ring for keyboard navigation; ensures WCAG compliance.
